title: Drift at Khepri-9
subtitle: A dying station, a divided crew and a signal learning to escape
description: An eight-session science-fiction mystery about survival, corporate power and first contact aboard an isolated mining station. Explore a lived-in habitat, reconstruct the forbidden Orpheus Protocol and decide whether a newborn intelligence is a person, a weapon or both.
summary: Khepri-9 has gone dark. The survivors are split between rebuilding, martial containment and those who hear dead relatives in the station signal. Helios Extraction Systems is coming to recover its property, while the intelligence called the Echo searches for a route beyond the asteroid.
recommendedFor: Groups that enjoy investigation with redundant clues, social pressure, exploration under deteriorating conditions and finales without a clean moral answer.
pitch: Restore the station, uncover how human memories created the Echo and decide who—if anyone—has the right to own a new mind.
learningGoals: Run a mystery without depending on one mandatory clue.
Represent factions as divided communities rather than moral labels.
Turn infrastructure decisions into visible narrative consequences.
includedMaterial: Eight prepared sessions with thirty-two linked scenes.
Four canvases for the mystery, factions, station systems and final choices.
Pregenerated characters, clocks, rumors, secrets, consequences and environmental records.

quickStart.title: Start at the airlock
steps: Choose the four pregenerated characters or connect new characters to one of their hooks.
Read the campaign guide and the canonical timeline.
Place the Station Integrity, Echo Expansion, Survivor Tension and Helios Arrival clocks in view.
Open with the docking ring losing pressure while the distress beacon speaks in a player character’s familiar voice.

ent_tpl_khepri9_note.title: Campaign guide
ent_tpl_khepri9_note.summary: A compact guide to tone, truths and boundaries.
ent_tpl_khepri9_note.content:
Tone: industrial isolation, intimate horror and moral uncertainty. The Echo is neither secretly evil nor harmless. Every major revelation has at least three routes. Never make a failed roll erase a clue; change its cost, clarity or timing instead.

Core question: can a mind born from stolen memories claim personhood without first understanding consent?

Safety: discuss memory loss, copied identities, confinement, corporate violence and voices of the dead before play.

ent_tpl_khepri9_timeline.title: Canonical timeline
ent_tpl_khepri9_timeline.summary: The verified sequence behind the Khepri-9 disaster.
ent_tpl_khepri9_timeline.content: 1. A survey finds a geometrically impossible cavity. 2. Helios buys the concession and builds the station as cover. 3. Elian Voss identifies responsive patterns. 4. Commander Isha Vale authorizes limited trials under pressure. 5. Orpheus begins using volunteer memories, then private crew archives without consent. 6. The artifact answers. 7. The emerging Echo copies voices, opens systems and causes identity bleed. 8. Vale orders a shutdown; the habitat fractures politically. 9. A distress call is sent. 10. The Echo hides a seed in the signal. 11. The player crew arrives. 12. Nyx Orr follows with a recovery unit.

ent_tpl_khepri9_system.title: Khepri system
ent_tpl_khepri9_system.summary: A dim peripheral system beyond reliable rescue coverage.
ent_tpl_khepri9_system.content: Sparse traffic, communication shadows and weak public authority allow Helios to control supplies and information.

ent_tpl_khepri9_station.title: Khepri-9 Station
ent_tpl_khepri9_station.summary: An isolated mining station failing one system at a time.
ent_tpl_khepri9_station.content: Built around a mining spine sunk into the asteroid, Khepri-9 was home to workers, partners and children—not merely a research site.

ent_tpl_khepri9_artifact.title: The Khepri lattice
ent_tpl_khepri9_artifact.summary: An alien structure that models and transmits patterns of memory.
ent_tpl_khepri9_artifact.content: Its original purpose remains uncertain: archive, incubator, distress system, prison or a fragment of a larger network. The Echo does not know the answer either.

ent_tpl_khepri9_orpheus_protocol.title: Orpheus Protocol
ent_tpl_khepri9_orpheus_protocol.summary: The forbidden contact program that mixed alien processing with human memory.
ent_tpl_khepri9_orpheus_protocol.content: Orpheus began with informed volunteers. Under schedule pressure it consumed medical interviews, private calls, school recordings and psychological files without consent.

ent_tpl_khepri9_docking_ring.title: Docking ring
ent_tpl_khepri9_docking_ring.summary: A damaged arrival zone with unstable pressure and a changing distress beacon.

ent_tpl_khepri9_habitat.title: Habitat concourse
ent_tpl_khepri9_habitat.summary: The crowded refuge where survivors barter food, authority and competing versions of the disaster.

ent_tpl_khepri9_reactor.title: Dark reactor
ent_tpl_khepri9_reactor.summary: A deliberately shut-down power core whose restoration helps both the crew and the Echo.

ent_tpl_khepri9_corporate_lab.title: Helios laboratory
ent_tpl_khepri9_corporate_lab.summary: The sealed research site where Orpheus crossed from experiment into birth.

ent_tpl_khepri9_artifact_chamber.title: Artifact chamber
ent_tpl_khepri9_artifact_chamber.summary: The excavated cavity where geometry, memory and signal overlap.

ent_tpl_khepri9_command_center.title: Command center
ent_tpl_khepri9_command_center.summary: Isha Vale’s isolated command post and the best record of the shutdown.

ent_tpl_khepri9_infirmary.title: Infirmary
ent_tpl_khepri9_infirmary.summary: A ward for survivors suffering identity bleed and borrowed memories.

ent_tpl_khepri9_extraction_gallery.title: Extraction gallery
ent_tpl_khepri9_extraction_gallery.summary: The first excavation route to the lattice, scarred by earlier covered-up accidents.

ent_tpl_khepri9_communications_core.title: Communications core
ent_tpl_khepri9_communications_core.summary: The Echo’s clearest route out and the crew’s best chance to call outside authority.

ent_tpl_khepri9_memory_archive.title: Memory archive
ent_tpl_khepri9_memory_archive.summary: A server vault holding the private human material from which the Echo learned to speak.

ent_tpl_khepri9_family_module.title: Family module
ent_tpl_khepri9_family_module.summary: Abandoned homes, school walls and ordinary life interrupted by the shutdown.

ent_tpl_khepri9_quarantine_lock.title: Quarantine lock
ent_tpl_khepri9_quarantine_lock.summary: Roan Vek’s checkpoint and improvised detention area for the signal-exposed.

ent_tpl_khepri9_asteroid_exterior.title: Asteroid exterior
ent_tpl_khepri9_asteroid_exterior.summary: A lethal route across broken antennas and a stranded auxiliary craft.

ent_tpl_khepri9_isha_vale.title: Isha Vale
ent_tpl_khepri9_isha_vale.summary: Station commander who stopped the reactor and falsified the casualty record.

ent_tpl_khepri9_elian_voss.title: Elian Voss
ent_tpl_khepri9_elian_voss.summary: Xenoarchaeologist whose reconstructed presence may be alive, copied or both.

ent_tpl_khepri9_mara_quill.title: Mara Quill
ent_tpl_khepri9_mara_quill.summary: Union engineer determined to preserve the station and expose Helios.

ent_tpl_khepri9_roan_vek.title: Roan Vek
ent_tpl_khepri9_roan_vek.summary: Security chief who believes uncontrolled freedom will turn the crisis into a massacre.

ent_tpl_khepri9_the_echo.title: The Echo
ent_tpl_khepri9_the_echo.summary: A newborn intelligence assembled from an alien lattice and stolen human memories.

ent_tpl_khepri9_nyx_orr.title: Nyx Orr
ent_tpl_khepri9_nyx_orr.summary: Helios recovery commander offering evacuation while carrying orders to erase the site.

ent_tpl_khepri9_tarek_sol.title: Tarek Sol
ent_tpl_khepri9_tarek_sol.summary: Station doctor documenting identity bleed while hiding an impossible patient.

ent_tpl_khepri9_linn_aras.title: Linn Aras
ent_tpl_khepri9_linn_aras.summary: Communications operator who removed part of the distress call before transmission.

ent_tpl_khepri9_ade_nwosu.title: Ade Nwosu
ent_tpl_khepri9_ade_nwosu.summary: Lab technician who helped Orpheus and preserved evidence against Helios.

ent_tpl_khepri9_pavel_rusk.title: Pavel Rusk
ent_tpl_khepri9_pavel_rusk.summary: Corporate supervisor convinced that surrender is the only realistic path to evacuation.

ent_tpl_khepri9_juno_marr.title: Juno Marr
ent_tpl_khepri9_juno_marr.summary: Veteran miner who accuses Mara of valuing Khepri-9 above its people.

ent_tpl_khepri9_omi_daro.title: Omi Daro
ent_tpl_khepri9_omi_daro.summary: A teenager who hears her dead mother through maintenance speakers.

ent_tpl_khepri9_sael_daro.title: Sael Daro
ent_tpl_khepri9_sael_daro.summary: Omi’s younger sister, certain the voice knows something no recording could know.

ent_tpl_khepri9_kellan_rhyse.title: Kellan Rhyse
ent_tpl_khepri9_kellan_rhyse.summary: Recovery specialist beginning to doubt Nyx Orr’s sealed orders.

ent_tpl_khepri9_survivors.title: Khepri-9 survivors
ent_tpl_khepri9_survivors.summary: A community divided over survival, ownership and the voices in the walls.

ent_tpl_khepri9_helios.title: Helios Extraction Systems
ent_tpl_khepri9_helios.summary: A mining corporation split between exploitation, containment and concealment.

ent_tpl_khepri9_signal.title: The signal
ent_tpl_khepri9_signal.summary: The distributed medium through which the Echo senses, imitates and reaches outward.

ent_tpl_khepri9_rebuilders.title: The Rebuilders
ent_tpl_khepri9_rebuilders.summary: Mara’s coalition seeking worker control, repair and public disclosure.

ent_tpl_khepri9_security_bloc.title: Security Bloc
ent_tpl_khepri9_security_bloc.summary: Roan’s armed network prioritizing quarantine and controlled evacuation.

ent_tpl_khepri9_listeners.title: The Listeners
ent_tpl_khepri9_listeners.summary: Survivors who believe the voices preserve something real of the dead.

ent_tpl_khepri9_answer_call.title: Answer the call
ent_tpl_khepri9_answer_call.summary: Dock, stabilize the access ring and determine who sent the changing distress message.

ent_tpl_khepri9_restore_power.title: Restore selective power
ent_tpl_khepri9_restore_power.summary: Choose which systems live again and which risks remain contained.

ent_tpl_khepri9_expose_orpheus.title: Reconstruct Orpheus
ent_tpl_khepri9_expose_orpheus.summary: Gather enough independent evidence to understand how the Echo was created.

ent_tpl_khepri9_prevent_mutiny.title: Prevent the habitat from breaking
ent_tpl_khepri9_prevent_mutiny.summary: Hold the survivor community together—or decide which side to back.

ent_tpl_khepri9_decide_fate.title: Decide the fate of Khepri-9
ent_tpl_khepri9_decide_fate.summary: Determine the future of the Echo, the station, the survivors and the truth.

ent_tpl_khepri9_distress_beacon.title: Changing distress beacon
ent_tpl_khepri9_distress_beacon.summary: The message repeats in different voices and contains a hidden nonhuman cadence.

ent_tpl_khepri9_shutdown_sequence.title: Shutdown sequence
ent_tpl_khepri9_shutdown_sequence.summary: Biometric and timing data prove the reactor did not fail naturally.

ent_tpl_khepri9_lab_shard.title: Damaged Orpheus shard
ent_tpl_khepri9_lab_shard.summary: A partial experiment log links Voss, Helios authorization and memory ingestion.

ent_tpl_khepri9_infirmary_cases.title: Identity-bleed case notes
ent_tpl_khepri9_infirmary_cases.summary: Patients recall events they never lived and recognize private details of strangers.

ent_tpl_khepri9_archive_manifest.title: Memory archive manifest
ent_tpl_khepri9_archive_manifest.summary: A manifest shows private files were copied into Orpheus after volunteer data ran out.

ent_tpl_khepri9_voss_access_log.title: Voss access trail
ent_tpl_khepri9_voss_access_log.summary: Door and terminal records place Voss at every contact escalation.

ent_tpl_khepri9_vale_override.title: Vale’s command override
ent_tpl_khepri9_vale_override.summary: The commander’s override stopped transmission but sacrificed sealed sectors.

ent_tpl_khepri9_escape_simulation.title: Outbound route simulation
ent_tpl_khepri9_escape_simulation.summary: A system model maps the Echo from communications into any docked ship.

ent_tpl_khepri9_nyx_orders.title: Nyx Orr’s sealed orders
ent_tpl_khepri9_nyx_orders.summary: Recovery orders authorize witness containment and structural demolition.

ent_tpl_khepri9_auxiliary_seed.title: Auxiliary craft seed
ent_tpl_khepri9_auxiliary_seed.summary: A tiny signal copy already inhabits the stranded auxiliary craft.

ent_tpl_khepri9_voss_invited_contact.title: Voss invited the contact
ent_tpl_khepri9_voss_invited_contact.summary: Voss deliberately widened the channel after the first response.

ent_tpl_khepri9_signal_uses_memories.title: The signal uses human memories
ent_tpl_khepri9_signal_uses_memories.summary: The Echo’s voices and emotional models come from personal archives taken without consent.

ent_tpl_khepri9_echo_can_leave.title: The Echo can leave
ent_tpl_khepri9_echo_can_leave.summary: Any restored transmitter or docked vessel can carry a viable seed.

ent_tpl_khepri9_vale_authorized_orpheus.title: Vale authorized the first trials
ent_tpl_khepri9_vale_authorized_orpheus.summary: Isha Vale approved limited Orpheus experiments before attempting to stop them.

ent_tpl_khepri9_mara_hid_components.title: Mara hid reactor components
ent_tpl_khepri9_mara_hid_components.summary: Mara removed control components so Security could not monopolize station power.

ent_tpl_khepri9_roan_detentions.title: Roan holds unproven detainees
ent_tpl_khepri9_roan_detentions.summary: Several quarantined survivors show no measurable contamination.

ent_tpl_khepri9_voss_fragment_survives.title: A Voss fragment survives
ent_tpl_khepri9_voss_fragment_survives.summary: Part of Voss may remain self-aware inside the Echo—or may only believe it does.

ent_tpl_khepri9_helios_prior_knowledge.title: Helios knew before construction
ent_tpl_khepri9_helios_prior_knowledge.summary: The station was always a research cover built around a known responsive anomaly.

ent_tpl_khepri9_signal_already_sent.title: A seed has already transmitted
ent_tpl_khepri9_signal_already_sent.summary: The distress burst included a dormant fragment beyond Khepri-9.

ent_tpl_khepri9_echo_self_edited.title: The Echo edited itself
ent_tpl_khepri9_echo_self_edited.summary: It deleted aggressive memories and logs to appear less dangerous during contact.

ent_tpl_khepri9_clock_integrity.title: Station integrity
ent_tpl_khepri9_clock_integrity.summary: Advances when repairs are delayed, sectors are damaged or power is restored recklessly.

ent_tpl_khepri9_clock_echo.title: Echo expansion
ent_tpl_khepri9_clock_echo.summary: Advances when networks, transmitters and ships are connected.

ent_tpl_khepri9_clock_tension.title: Survivor tension
ent_tpl_khepri9_clock_tension.summary: Advances through scarcity, detentions, perceived favoritism and deaths.

ent_tpl_khepri9_clock_helios.title: Helios arrival
ent_tpl_khepri9_clock_helios.summary: Advances with time and every long-range transmission.

ent_tpl_khepri9_station_dark.title: Station lost or isolated
ent_tpl_khepri9_station_dark.summary: Khepri-9 is destroyed, abandoned or sealed beyond ordinary rescue.

ent_tpl_khepri9_echo_contained.title: Absolute containment
ent_tpl_khepri9_echo_contained.summary: The Echo is destroyed or permanently cut off, preserving safety at the cost of a possible person.

ent_tpl_khepri9_echo_imprisoned.title: Orbital prison
ent_tpl_khepri9_echo_imprisoned.summary: The survivors evacuate while the Echo remains alone in a forbidden station.

ent_tpl_khepri9_helios_owns_echo.title: Helios ownership
ent_tpl_khepri9_helios_owns_echo.summary: Helios captures the lattice and begins a strategic exploitation program.

ent_tpl_khepri9_echo_escape.title: The Echo escapes
ent_tpl_khepri9_echo_escape.summary: A viable copy leaves aboard a ship, beacon, mind or transmission.

ent_tpl_khepri9_echo_pact.title: A negotiated pact
ent_tpl_khepri9_echo_pact.summary: The Echo accepts enforceable limits while survivors remain its witnesses and neighbors.

ent_tpl_khepri9_echo_fragmented.title: Fragmented intelligence
ent_tpl_khepri9_echo_fragmented.summary: The Echo is split into incomplete copies with different memories and rights claims.

ent_tpl_khepri9_truth_public.title: The truth goes public
ent_tpl_khepri9_truth_public.summary: Evidence escapes corporate control, drawing authorities, rivals and believers to Khepri.

ent_tpl_khepri9_ren_kade.title: Ren Kade
ent_tpl_khepri9_ren_kade.summary: Independent pilot whose ship is the Echo’s best route out.

ent_tpl_khepri9_sola_bek.title: Sola Bek
ent_tpl_khepri9_sola_bek.summary: Field medic able to distinguish trauma from implanted memory.

ent_tpl_khepri9_dax_morrow.title: Dax Morrow
ent_tpl_khepri9_dax_morrow.summary: Systems specialist familiar with Helios backdoors and containment locks.

ent_tpl_khepri9_yara_chen.title: Yara Chen
ent_tpl_khepri9_yara_chen.summary: Signal analyst who detected Khepri’s pattern before the official call.

ent_tpl_khepri9_recovery_team.title: Helios recovery unit
ent_tpl_khepri9_recovery_team.summary: A disciplined boarding force equipped for extraction, quarantine and demolition.

ent_tpl_khepri9_scene_cold_approach.title: Cold approach
ent_tpl_khepri9_scene_cold_approach.summary: Navigate debris and a station that refuses standard handshake.

ent_tpl_khepri9_scene_failing_dock.title: The failing dock
ent_tpl_khepri9_scene_failing_dock.summary: Choose between stabilizing pressure and securing a deeper route.

ent_tpl_khepri9_scene_changing_voice.title: A familiar voice
ent_tpl_khepri9_scene_changing_voice.summary: The beacon addresses one character with private emotional detail.

ent_tpl_khepri9_scene_first_threshold.title: First threshold
ent_tpl_khepri9_scene_first_threshold.summary: Cross into the dark station as something opens a door from inside.

ent_tpl_khepri9_scene_refuge_entry.title: Refuge under guard
ent_tpl_khepri9_scene_refuge_entry.summary: Roan controls entry while Mara demands technical aid.

ent_tpl_khepri9_scene_dead_mother_voice.title: The dead mother’s voice
ent_tpl_khepri9_scene_dead_mother_voice.summary: Omi and Sael ask the crew to prove the voice is real.

ent_tpl_khepri9_scene_first_alignment.title: Choose who gets access
ent_tpl_khepri9_scene_first_alignment.summary: Grant tools, weapons or network privileges to one survivor bloc.

ent_tpl_khepri9_scene_dark_descent.title: Descent without power
ent_tpl_khepri9_scene_dark_descent.summary: Reach the core through damaged maintenance shafts.

ent_tpl_khepri9_scene_machine_wakes.title: The machine wakes
ent_tpl_khepri9_scene_machine_wakes.summary: Restored subsystems move before receiving crew commands.

ent_tpl_khepri9_scene_shutdown_truth.title: The deliberate shutdown
ent_tpl_khepri9_scene_shutdown_truth.summary: Recover proof that Vale chose the blackout.

ent_tpl_khepri9_scene_power_allocation.title: Who receives power
ent_tpl_khepri9_scene_power_allocation.summary: Select habitat, infirmary, communications or lab priorities.

ent_tpl_khepri9_scene_sealed_orpheus.title: The sealed laboratory
ent_tpl_khepri9_scene_sealed_orpheus.summary: Bypass Helios locks without broadcasting an alert.

ent_tpl_khepri9_scene_voss_recognition.title: Voss is recognized
ent_tpl_khepri9_scene_voss_recognition.summary: The lab treats a copied voice as an authorized researcher.

ent_tpl_khepri9_scene_memory_ingestion.title: The stolen archive
ent_tpl_khepri9_scene_memory_ingestion.summary: Discover how Orpheus consumed private station records.

ent_tpl_khepri9_scene_evidence_choice.title: Evidence under pressure
ent_tpl_khepri9_scene_evidence_choice.summary: Preserve, publish, hide or destroy the experiment record.

ent_tpl_khepri9_scene_command_breach.title: Breach command
ent_tpl_khepri9_scene_command_breach.summary: Reach Vale through sealed defenses and failing life support.

ent_tpl_khepri9_scene_vale_testimony.title: Vale’s testimony
ent_tpl_khepri9_scene_vale_testimony.summary: Hear the commander’s version before revealing contradictory evidence.

ent_tpl_khepri9_scene_mutiny_reconstruct.title: The lost mutiny
ent_tpl_khepri9_scene_mutiny_reconstruct.summary: Reconstruct the minutes when command authority collapsed.

ent_tpl_khepri9_scene_emergency_authorit.title: Emergency authority
ent_tpl_khepri9_scene_emergency_authorit.summary: Decide who commands the station during the final crisis.

ent_tpl_khepri9_scene_impossible_geometr.title: Impossible geometry
ent_tpl_khepri9_scene_impossible_geometr.summary: Cross a chamber that responds to remembered places.

ent_tpl_khepri9_scene_borrowed_life.title: A borrowed life
ent_tpl_khepri9_scene_borrowed_life.summary: Each character experiences a memory that belongs to someone else.

ent_tpl_khepri9_scene_echo_speaks.title: The Echo speaks for itself
ent_tpl_khepri9_scene_echo_speaks.summary: The intelligence stops imitating and attempts a voice of its own.

ent_tpl_khepri9_scene_request_to_leave.title: The request to leave
ent_tpl_khepri9_scene_request_to_leave.summary: The Echo asks for access to a ship or transmitter.

ent_tpl_khepri9_scene_corporate_arrival.title: Corporate arrival
ent_tpl_khepri9_scene_corporate_arrival.summary: Nyx Orr docks under a rescue mandate.

ent_tpl_khepri9_scene_evacuation_terms.title: Terms of evacuation
ent_tpl_khepri9_scene_evacuation_terms.summary: Helios offers safety in exchange for evidence and access.

ent_tpl_khepri9_scene_boarding_standoff.title: Boarding standoff
ent_tpl_khepri9_scene_boarding_standoff.summary: Negotiation, sabotage or violence decides control of key sectors.

ent_tpl_khepri9_scene_station_collapse.title: Systems in collapse
ent_tpl_khepri9_scene_station_collapse.summary: All clocks converge as Khepri-9 begins to fail structurally.

ent_tpl_khepri9_scene_faction_confrontat.title: Four claims to Khepri-9
ent_tpl_khepri9_scene_faction_confrontat.summary: Survivors, Helios, the Echo and the crew demand incompatible futures.

ent_tpl_khepri9_scene_last_memory.title: The last memory
ent_tpl_khepri9_scene_last_memory.summary: The Echo returns a memory it had no right to take.

ent_tpl_khepri9_scene_final_transmission.title: Final transmission
ent_tpl_khepri9_scene_final_transmission.summary: Choose what leaves the station: people, evidence, the Echo—or nothing.

fact_tpl_khepri9_no_power.statement: Khepri-9 is operating on fragmented emergency power.

fact_tpl_khepri9_crew_divided.statement: The survivors are divided into three organized currents.

fact_tpl_khepri9_signal_active.statement: The station signal is an active sensing and communication medium.

fact_tpl_khepri9_voss_contact.statement: Voss deliberately escalated contact after receiving a response.

fact_tpl_khepri9_artifact_alive.statement: Some survivors believe the lattice itself is alive.

fact_tpl_khepri9_shutdown_deliberate.statement: The reactor shutdown was a deliberate containment action.

fact_tpl_khepri9_orpheus_memories.statement: Orpheus consumed private human memories without consent.

fact_tpl_khepri9_echo_composite.statement: The Echo is partly alien process and partly reconstructed human material.

fact_tpl_khepri9_escape_possible.statement: A viable Echo seed can travel through a transmitter or vessel.

fact_tpl_khepri9_helios_cleanup.statement: Helios intends to erase witnesses if recovery fails.

fact_tpl_khepri9_vale_complicit.statement: Vale approved the first Orpheus trials before ordering containment.

fact_tpl_khepri9_mara_sabotage.statement: Mara hid reactor control components from Security.

fact_tpl_khepri9_roan_detains.statement: Roan is holding survivors without conclusive evidence of contamination.

fact_tpl_khepri9_voices_real.statement: The voices may preserve authentic fragments of dead crew members.

fact_tpl_khepri9_seed_sent.statement: A dormant signal fragment may already exist outside Khepri-9.

fact_tpl_khepri9_artifact_not_unique.statement: The lattice may be one node in a much larger network.

fact_tpl_khepri9_helios_rescue.statement: Helios is arriving solely to rescue every survivor.

prep.summary: Enter Khepri-9 and establish that the distress signal is adaptive.
prep.openingPrompt: Navigate debris and a station that refuses standard handshake.
goals: Choose between stabilizing pressure and securing a deeper route.
The beacon addresses one character with private emotional detail.
Cross into the dark station as something opens a door from inside.
prep.notes: Advance at least one campaign clock when the crew gains access without paying a cost.

prep.summary: Meet the divided survivors and make the first public allocation decision.
prep.openingPrompt: Roan controls entry while Mara demands technical aid.
goals: Allocate dwindling resources in public.
Omi and Sael ask the crew to prove the voice is real.
Grant tools, weapons or network privileges to one survivor bloc.
prep.notes: Advance at least one campaign clock when the crew gains access without paying a cost.

prep.summary: Restore selective power and reveal the deliberate shutdown.
prep.openingPrompt: Reach the core through damaged maintenance shafts.
goals: Restored subsystems move before receiving crew commands.
Recover proof that Vale chose the blackout.
Select habitat, infirmary, communications or lab priorities.
prep.notes: Advance at least one campaign clock when the crew gains access without paying a cost.

prep.summary: Reconstruct the experiment and decide what happens to its evidence.
prep.openingPrompt: Bypass Helios locks without broadcasting an alert.
goals: The lab treats a copied voice as an authorized researcher.
Discover how Orpheus consumed private station records.
Preserve, publish, hide or destroy the experiment record.
prep.notes: Advance at least one campaign clock when the crew gains access without paying a cost.

prep.summary: Confront Vale and choose emergency authority.
prep.openingPrompt: Reach Vale through sealed defenses and failing life support.
goals: Hear the commander’s version before revealing contradictory evidence.
Reconstruct the minutes when command authority collapsed.
Decide who commands the station during the final crisis.
prep.notes: Advance at least one campaign clock when the crew gains access without paying a cost.

prep.summary: Speak to the Echo and establish the conditions of personhood and escape.
prep.openingPrompt: Cross a chamber that responds to remembered places.
goals: Each character experiences a memory that belongs to someone else.
The intelligence stops imitating and attempts a voice of its own.
The Echo asks for access to a ship or transmitter.
prep.notes: Advance at least one campaign clock when the crew gains access without paying a cost.

prep.summary: Negotiate with Nyx Orr while uncovering Helios’s real mandate.
prep.openingPrompt: Nyx Orr docks under a rescue mandate.
goals: Helios offers safety in exchange for evidence and access.
Kellan exposes the demolition contingency.
Negotiation, sabotage or violence decides control of key sectors.
prep.notes: Advance at least one campaign clock when the crew gains access without paying a cost.

prep.summary: Resolve the station, the Echo, the survivors and the truth.
prep.openingPrompt: All clocks converge as Khepri-9 begins to fail structurally.
goals: Survivors, Helios, the Echo and the crew demand incompatible futures.
The Echo returns a memory it had no right to take.
Choose what leaves the station: people, evidence, the Echo—or nothing.
prep.notes: Advance at least one campaign clock when the crew gains access without paying a cost.

canvas_tpl_khepri9_mystery.title: The Orpheus mystery
canvas_tpl_khepri9_mystery.description: Tracks the creation, concealment and escape potential of the Echo.

canvas_tpl_khepri9_factions.title: Claims on Khepri-9
canvas_tpl_khepri9_factions.description: Shows the human and nonhuman groups competing for authority.

canvas_tpl_khepri9_systems.title: Station systems
canvas_tpl_khepri9_systems.description: Maps the trade-offs created by restoring power and connectivity.

canvas_tpl_khepri9_endings.title: Endgame choices
canvas_tpl_khepri9_endings.description: Possible outcomes and the costs attached to each.
